testcase.name: test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:19: in test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2 toks = tokenize("let x = 1 + 2;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_keywords_vs_identifiers

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'i' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:27: in test_keywords_vs_identifiers toks = tokenize("if iffy true truely") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'i' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_multi_char_punct

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character '=' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:36: in test_multi_char_punct toks = tokenize("== != <= >= && ||") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character '=' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_single_char_punct_after_multi

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'a' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:44: in test_single_char_punct_after_multi toks = tokenize("a = b") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'a' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_string_escapes

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character '"' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:50: in test_string_escapes toks = tokenize(r'"hello\n\tworld\"\\"') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character '"' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_comments_stripped

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:56: in test_comments_stripped toks = tokenize("let x = 1; // a comment\nlet y = 2;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_line_col_tracking

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:63: in test_line_col_tracking toks = tokenize("let\n x = 1;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'l' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_number_and_float

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character '4' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:82: in test_number_and_float toks = tokenize("42 3.14") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character '4' at line 1, column 1

testcase.name: test_eof_only_once

failure.message: Exception: Unexpected character 'x' at line 1, column 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:89: in test_eof_only_once toks = tokenize("x") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/lexer.py:35: in tokenize raise Exception(f"Unexpected character '{char}' at line {line}, column {col}") E Exception: Unexpected character 'x' at line 1, column 1
